title: Nominations Open for 2019 NANA Awards
summary: Do you know an Elder, youth, NANA shareholder, small business, military service personnel, or non-shareholder that deserves to be recognized for their contributions to NANA? Nominate them for the 2019 NANA Awards! Forms are available at your local NANA community office and for download here . Nomina...

title: NANA Elders’ Settlement Trust Announces 2018 Distribution
summary: The Trustees of the NANA Elders’ Settlement Trust – or NEST – voted to issue a dividend of 1,418.00 per Elder. The dividend will be paid on or around February 14, 2019, and is not taxable. Elders 65 or older as of December 31, 2018, will receive the dividend. Those who have elected to receive their...

title: Taxability for 2018
summary: Koniag is issuing the following informational forms to Shareholders to report 2018 payments: 1099 DIV – The January 2018 Dividend is considered to be taxable income and will be reported on a Form 1099-DIV. Under IRS rules, if the taxable portion is less than $10, we are not required to send out a 10...
